response.justification: Although Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with over 20 years in the industry, his background is primarily in full-stack web development using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. He lacks the mandatory 5 to 10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows and deep SQL Server/Oracle experience. Additionally, his financial domain exposure is limited to a short stint on web-based investment platforms rather than the required Fixed Income or heavy Capital Markets systems, making him a poor fit for this specialized role.
strengths: Over 20 years of broad software engineering experience, including Staff-level roles.
Strong background in CI/CD pipelines, TDD, and DevOps infrastructure.
Some exposure to the investment domain through his work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ experience (only brief exposure in 2007-2008).
No demonstrated experience with Windows platform development or enterprise SQL Server/Oracle.
Lacks deep domain expertise in Fixed Income, Derivatives, or core Capital Markets.
